summary: Iteration 24 - Testing refactored routes (reports_routes.py, drivers_routes.py, payroll_routes.py). All 26 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages (Login, Dashboard, Reports, Settings/Employees, POS, Delivery) working correctly with no console errors.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - Admin login successful
POST /api/auth/login - Owner login successful
GET /api/reports/sales - Returns sales report with total_sales, total_orders, by_payment_method, by_delivery_app, top_products
GET /api/reports/inventory - Returns inventory report with total_items, low_stock_count, total_inventory_value
GET /api/reports/profit-loss - Returns profit/loss report with revenue, gross_profit, net_profit
GET /api/drivers - Returns drivers list
GET /api/drivers?include_orders=true - Returns drivers with current orders
GET /api/drivers/{id}/stats - Returns driver statistics (unpaid_total, paid_total, pending_orders)
GET /api/drivers/locations - Returns all drivers locations for map
GET /api/drivers/portal/by-phone/{phone} - Returns 404 for unknown phone (no auth required)
GET /api/deductions - Returns deductions list
GET /api/deductions with date filters - Works correctly
GET /api/bonuses - Returns bonuses list
GET /api/bonuses with date filters - Works correctly
GET /api/payroll - Returns payroll records
GET /api/payroll?month=2026-01 - Returns payroll with month filter
GET /api/reports/payroll-summary?month=2026-01 - Returns payroll summary with employees and totals
GET /api/products - Returns products list (regression test)
GET /api/categories - Returns categories list (regression test)
GET /api/employees - Returns employees list (regression test)
GET /api/branches - Returns branches list (regression test)
GET /api/orders - Returns orders list (regression test)
GET /api/staff - Returns staff list (regression test)
Reports require authentication - Returns 401/403 without token
Drivers require authentication - Returns 401/403 without token
Payroll requires authentication - Returns 401/403 without token

login.notes: Beautiful login page with restaurant background slideshow. Login works correctly.

dashboard.notes: Dashboard shows quick action buttons, statistics section with period filters, recent orders.

reports.notes: Reports page shows tabs (المبيعات, المشتريات, المصاريف, الأرباح, الأصناف, التوصيل, الإلغاءات, الخصومات, الآجل), date range filters, branch selector, statistics cards, export buttons (Excel, PDF).

settings_employees.notes: Settings page shows multiple tabs. الأدوار والموظفين tab shows staff list with name, email, role, branch, status. Add Staff button available.

pos.notes: POS page shows 6 categories with images (برغر, بيتزا, مشروبات, حلويات, سلطات, دجاج), products with prices, 10 tables grid, order type tabs (محلي, سفري, توصيل), cart with payment options (نقدي, بطاقة, آجل).

delivery.notes: Delivery page shows drivers management with statistics (active drivers, pending orders, paid today, unpaid total), driver cards with details, tabs for drivers/map/ready orders.

critical_code_review_comments: Code refactoring successful - ~1350 lines moved from server.py to 3 new route files
reports_routes.py (~600 lines) - All report endpoints working correctly
drivers_routes.py (~350 lines) - All driver endpoints working correctly
payroll_routes.py (~400 lines) - All payroll endpoints working correctly
shared.py - Shared utilities properly extracted (get_database, get_current_user, build_tenant_query, etc.)
All endpoints properly authenticated with JWT
No regression in original APIs (products, categories, employees, branches, orders, staff)
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_refactored_routes.py - Created comprehensive test suite for refactored routes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 24 completed successfully. Code refactoring verified - ~1350 lines moved from server.py to 3 new route files: reports_routes.py, drivers_routes.py, payroll_routes.py. All 26 backend tests passed. Frontend pages (Login, Dashboard, Reports, Settings/Employees, POS, Delivery) working correctly. No JavaScript console errors found. No regression in original APIs.
